---
name: twn-feature-packet
description: Compile requirements from multiple TWN volumes and current code evidence into one implementation-ready feature packet.
---

# TWN Feature Packet

For one feature, gather all linked blueprint requirements, original source
sections, audit evidence, relevant code, and architecture decisions.

Create a bounded packet containing source map, specification, current state,
user stories, domain rules, permissions, data requirements, UI states, API
contracts, failure cases, security/privacy, accessibility, implementation plan,
acceptance criteria, test plan, learning guide, content opportunities, and
unresolved decisions.

Do not implement code or invent decisions.
